title: Summary of Application requirements for cannabis analytical testing - Canada.ca
content:
## Summary of Application requirements for cannabis analytical testing
- Cannabis Regulations
This document provides information on the application    requirements to obtain a licence to conduct analytical testing on cannabis    from Health Canada under the Cannabis    Act and Cannabis Regulations .
- Getting started: the application process
- Step 1: Confirm the need for analytical testing licence
- Step 2: Create an account in the cannabis tracking and licensing    system (CTLS) Create an individual account in the CTLS Associated individuals create accounts in the CTLS
- Create an individual account in the CTLS
- Associated individuals create accounts in the CTLS
- Step 3: Develop your application I. Licence ownership (licence holder) II. Mailing address III. Site details (including activities) IV. Site personnel V. Destruction VI. Physical security VII. Record keeping
- I. Licence ownership (licence holder)
- III. Site details (including activities)
- VI. Physical security
- Step 4 - Submit your application Following submission Service standards Administrative procedures
- Following submission
- Administrative procedures
- Feedback – help us improve
- Appendix A: Physical security plan
- Appendix B: Record keeping attestation
- Appendix C: Submission checklist
View complete guide Download PDF (403 KB, 23 pages)
Published: September 6, 2019
